class Point:
    x: int
    y: int

    def __init__(self, x_val: int, y_val: int):
        self.x = x_val
        self.y = y_val

def main():
    p: Point = Point(3, 4)
    match p:
        case Point() as pt:
            print(pt.x + pt.y)
        case _:
            print(0)
    
    val: int? = None()
    match val:
        case int() as v if v is not None:
            print(v.unwrap())
        case _:
            print(42)
    
    n: int = 15
    match n:
        case int() as x if x > 10:
            print(x - 5)
        case int() as x:
            print(x + 5)
        case _:
            print(0)
